---
title: "English Oak (Quercus robur)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Quercus*](/trees/genus/quercus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 25 - English Oak](../25.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 186 — English oak](../186.html) |  |
| [Tree 304 — English oak](../304.html) |  |
| [Tree 308 — English oak](../308.html) |  |
| [Tree 312 — English oak](../312.html) |  |
| [Tree 319 — English oak](../319.html) |  |
| [Tree 321 — English oak](../321.html) |  |
| [Tree 322 — English oak](../322.html) |  |
| [Tree 323 — English oak](../323.html) |  |
| [Tree 328 — English oak](../328.html) |  |
| [Tree 329 — English oak](../329.html) |  |
| [Tree 331 — English oak](../331.html) |  |
| [Tree 332 — English oak](../332.html) |  |
| [Tree 340 — English oak](../340.html) |  |
| [Tree 344 — English oak](../344.html) |  |
| [Tree 353 — English oak](../353.html) |  |
| [Tree 357 — English oak](../357.html) |  |
| [Tree 364 — English oak](../364.html) |  |
| [Tree 377 — English oak](../377.html) |  |
| [Tree 386 — English oak](../386.html) |  |
| [Tree 392 — English oak](../392.html) |  |
| [Tree 393 — English oak](../393.html) |  |
| [Tree 395 — English oak](../395.html) |  |
| [Tree 396 — English oak](../396.html) |  |
| [Tree 398 — English oak](../398.html) |  |
| [Tree 399 — English oak](../399.html) |  |
| [Tree 3357 — English oak](../3357.html) |  |
